title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at IBM India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at IBM India
jsonLd.description:
IBM India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
